tasks.label: INARI: Pull & Run (pick config)
tasks.command: ssh -t inari 'cd /diskdata2/resirf/Res-IRF4 && git pull && nohup nice /data/software/anaconda3/envs/Res-IRF4/bin/python3.8 -m project.main -c ${input:configFile} -cpu ${input:cpuCount} > run_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log 2>&1 & exec ${SHELL:-bash} -l'

tasks.label: INARI: Optimal | Policy Design
tasks.command: ssh -t inari 'cd /diskdata2/resirf/Res-IRF4 && git pull && nohup nice /data/software/anaconda3/envs/Res-IRF4/bin/python3.8 -m project.main -c project/config/policies/optimal/policy_optimal.json -cpu 10 > run_optimal_policy.log 2>&1 & exec ${SHELL:-bash} -l'

tasks.label: INARI: Check running jobs
tasks.command: ssh inari 'ps aux | grep python3.8 | grep -v grep'

tasks.label: INARI: Open top
tasks.command: ssh -t inari 'top; exec ${SHELL:-bash} -l'

tasks.label: INARI: Tail latest log
tasks.command: ssh inari 'cd /diskdata2/resirf/Res-IRF4 && tail -f $(ls -t run_*.log | head -1)'

inputs.description: Config file path (relative to project root)
